title: Sieversia sredinskiana
taxonomy: Sieversia sredinskiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, specifically in Kyrgyzstan. It is a perennial herb that belongs to the genus Sieversia, which includes several other species of flowering plants. Sieversia sredinskiana is closely related to other species in the Rosaceae family, such as apples and roses. The classification of this plant is further supported by its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis.

The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its medicinal uses.
